query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A porcelain doll face viewed through translucent fabric or fogged glass, showing one visible blue glass eye, painted eyebrows, pale skin, and strawberry-blonde molded hair arranged in curls around the cheeks and forehead.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred porcelain doll face seen through diffused, fog-like material, its features smeared and indistinct except for a single prominent blue glass eye that pierces the haze; painted details and molded curls dissolve into soft, unresolving ambiguity, creating an ethereal yet unsettling dreamlike veil over the antique toy.
